reveal_nightmare.name: Reveal Nightmare
reveal_nightmare.desc: Reveal a face-down nightmare on the target layer

discard_nightmare.desc: Discard a face-up nightmare on the target layer

discard_hidden_nightmare.desc: Discard a face-down nightmare on the target layer

activate_nightmare.name: Activate Nightmare
activate_nightmare.desc: Activate a face-up nightmare on the target layer

secret_passage_teleport.name: Secret Passage Teleport
secret_passage_teleport.desc: Discard 1 card → teleport a player to an adjacent layer (up to 2/turn)

deal_bribe.name: Deal Bribe
deal_bribe.desc: Randomly deal 1 bribe from the pool to a chosen thief
